titleStmt.title: SII 17.269: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 269. (A.R. No. 246 of 1904.) CHANDRAGIRI, CHANDRAGIRI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the Kōdaṇḍarāmasvāmin temple.
The details of date given in this inscription, viz., Ś. 1469, Plavaṅga, Kaṛkaṭaka ba. 7 Saturday, Rēvatī, regularly correspond to 1547 A.D., July 9.

It records an order of the governor of Chandragiri to the 74 dēvasthānams in Chandragiri in Chandṟagiri-rājyam in Vaikunda-vaḷanāḍu in Tiruvēṅkaḍakōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam, granting the levies talaiyārikkam, māhā[ri]kkam, kōyil adhikāri koṟṟilakkai, the paṭṭam and pavitram due at the Ugādi, and Dīvaḷigai kaḍai••• kkuṟukkam, etc. from Chandragiri, the donor's fief, to the temple of god Raghuṉātha. Other details are lost since the inscription is incomplete.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvara rā
jātirāja Irājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra
catācivatevamakārāyar pṛtivirājyam paṇṇi A
ruḷāniṉṟa sakāṟtam 1000 4 100 6 10 9l ce
llāniṉṟa plavaṅka saṅvatcarattu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu
Aparapakṣattu cattamiyum revatiyum peṟṟa caṉivārattu
ṉāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu tiruveṅkaṭako
ṭṭattu vaikuntavaḷanāṭṭil cantṟakiri Irājjiyattil
cantrakiriyil Eḻupattuṉālu tevastāṉattukku Eṉ paṟṟu varu
kiṟa cantrakiriyil raghuṉātaṉ koyilukku cantrakirikku Iṟukati
ṟa talaiyārikkamum mākārikkamum koyil Atikāri koṟṟi
lakkaiyum Ukāti tivaḷikai paṭṭam pavitramum kaṭai
kkuṟukkamumIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.269 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
